zh.Desmond, Kerry, Munster, Ireland: 愛爾蘭迪 本 克里
zh.Desmond, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 卡萬戴蒙
zh.lifeSummary: 當Donal McCarthy V King of Desmond於1303年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 克里時，他的父親Cormac MacCarthy Mor King of Desmond32歲，母親Honoria FitzMaurice23歲。他於1340年之前與Honora FitzMaurice在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1390年在愛爾蘭庫迪 卡萬戴蒙享年87歲。

zh-hans.Desmond, Kerry, Munster, Ireland: 爱尔兰迪 本 克里
zh-hans.Desmond, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 卡萬戴蒙
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Donal McCarthy V King of Desmond于1303年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 克里时，他的父亲Cormac MacCarthy Mor King of Desmond32岁，母亲Honoria FitzMaurice23岁。他于1340年之前与Honora FitzMaurice在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1390年在爱尔兰庫迪 卡萬戴蒙享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Desmond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Aileen, Brendan, Colm, Donal, Liam, Mairead, Sean Patrick, Siobhan.

Irish (Cork): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Deasmhumhnaigh ‘descendant of the man from southern Munster’, from deas ‘south’ + Mumhain ‘Munster’, an ancient Irish kingdom named for Mumhu, one of its early kings. The surname Desmond has passed into common use as a personal name, not only in Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Donal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: McCarthy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Liam, Cormac, Niall, Aileen, Brigid, Conor, Declan, Dermod, Dermot, Finbar.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cárthaigh ‘son of Cárthach’, a personal name meaning ‘loving’. This was the name of a ruling family in Munster. In Ireland major branches were distinguished by the following epithets: mór ‘great’ in Kerry, riabhach ‘brindled’ in Carbery, west Cork.

variants.name: McArthy
meanings: Car, dear, and tir, a country, and ać for neać, an individual, originally cartać, meaning a beloved countryman

variants.name: McCarty
meanings: Irish: variant of McCarthy , reflecting the common southern Irish pronunciation of th.

nameMeanings.name: King
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word for a male monarch, bestowed, especially in America, with a hint of the notion that the bearer would have kingly qualities;  compare  Duke   and   Earl .  In some cases it may be a transferred use of the surname (originally a nickname or an occupational name given to someone who was employed in a royal household). Its frequency among African Americans is no doubt partly attributable to the civil rights leader  Martin Luther King  (  1929–68 ). It is also used as a short form of   Kingsley .

variants.name: Kingsley
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, originally a local name derived from various places (in Cheshire, Hampshire, Staffordshire) named in Old English as Cyningeslēah ‘king's wood’.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Donal McCarthy V King of Desmond was born in 1303, in County Kerry, Ireland, his father, Cormac MacCarthy Mor King of Desmond, was 32 and his mother, Honoria FitzMaurice, was 23. He married Honora FitzMaurice before 1340, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1390, in Diamond, County Cavan, Ireland, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Donal McCarthy V King of Desmond est né en 1303, à County Kerry, Irlande, son père, Cormac MacCarthy Mor King of Desmond, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Honoria FitzMaurice, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Honora FitzMaurice avant 1340, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1390, à Diamond, County Cavan, Irlande, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Donal McCarthy V King of Desmond 1303 in County Kerry, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Cormac MacCarthy Mor King of Desmond 32 und seine Mutter Honoria FitzMaurice 23. Er hat vor 1340 in Europa Honora FitzMaurice geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1390 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Diamond, County Cavan, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Donal McCarthy V King of Desmond è nato il nel 1303 nel County Kerry, Irlanda, il suo padre, Cormac MacCarthy Mor King of Desmond, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Honoria FitzMaurice, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Honora FitzMaurice prima del 1340, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1390, nel Diamond, County Cavan, Irlanda, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Donal McCarthy V King of Desmondが1303年にアイルランドコウントイ ケリーで生まれた時，父Cormac MacCarthy Mor King of Desmondは32歳，母Honoria FitzMauriceは23歳であった。1340年以前にヨーロッパでHonora FitzMauriceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1390年にアイルランドコウントイ カヴァンディアモンドで87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Donal McCarthy V King of Desmond(이)가 1303년 아일랜드 카운티 케리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Cormac MacCarthy Mor King of Desmond(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Honoria FitzMaurice(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1340년 이전 우럽에서 Honora FitzMaurice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1390년 아일랜드 카운티 캐반 다이아몬드에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Donal McCarthy V King of Desmond nasceu em 1303, em County Kerry, Irlanda, seu pai, Cormac MacCarthy Mor King of Desmond, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Honoria FitzMaurice, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Honora FitzMaurice antes 1340, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1390, em Diamond, County Cavan, Irlanda, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Donal McCarthy V King of Desmond родился в 1303 г. в местности коунти кирри, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Cormac MacCarthy Mor King of Desmond было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Honoria FitzMaurice, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Honora FitzMaurice перед 1340 г. в местности Европа. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1390 г. в местности дямонд, коунти каван, Ирландия в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Donal McCarthy V King of Desmond nació en 1303, en County Kerry, Irlanda, su papá, Cormac MacCarthy Mor King of Desmond, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Honoria FitzMaurice, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Honora FitzMaurice antes de 1340, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1390, en Diamond, County Cavan, Irlanda, a la edad de 87 años.
